creator: sv@ulstu.ru
text:
With this:

# pkg iinfo sddm
plasma5-sddm-kcm-5.27.6
sddm-0.19.0_8

I have six options in Application Launcher: 

Lock
Log Out
Wait
Sleep
Restart
Shut Down

With this:

# pkg iinfo sddm
plasma5-sddm-kcm-5.27.6
sddm-0.20.0

I have only two options in Application Launcher: 
Lock
Log Out


FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE-p1 amd64
